title: Chinese Coal Import Demand Prospects Finally Improving
section_path: Chinese Coal Import Demand Prospects Finally Improving
section_path_text: Chinese Coal Import Demand Prospects Finally Improving
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, domestic coal production totaled 381 million tons in July. This is down month-on-month by 40.1 million tons (-10%), is down year-on-year by 9.4 million tons (-2%), and marks the first time since May 2024 without year-on-year growth. Image reference: Chart 1.jpg | assets/2025-08-22_chinese-coal-import-demand-prospects-finally-improving_img_chart1_9f409232212e.jpg
Coal-derived electricity generation, which makes up the bulk of China's electricity generation, totaled 602 billion kilowatt hours.
